Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-31-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: P. Richard Colombatto, Esq. 391-6182 for pltfs/x-defts & moving parties; Jennifer E. Torbohn, Esq. 464-4604 for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling however strikes the $1,000.00 fees per stipulation. Order signed in open court. (AJR/PB)

Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-23-2002 Continued To Jul-31-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: P. Richard Colombatto, Esq. 391-6182 for pltfs/x-defts & moving parties; Jeffrey H. Belote, Esq. 464-4604 for defts & opposing parties Arnaldo & Elsa Bustamante.
RULING: The Court continues the matter to 07/31/02 (opposition was filed). Pltf to file reply by 07/25. (Courtesy copies of opposition lodged.) (AJR/ju)
